stages.concept:
# Unit 133: 전치사 + 관계대명사 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **전치사 + 관계대명사**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> This is the house **in which** I was born.
> 이것은 내가 태어난 집이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 관계대명사 앞에 전치사를 놓을 수 있어요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 전치사를 뒤에 놓는 경우 (비격식):

> This is the house **(which)** I was born **in**.
> The girl **(whom)** I talked **to** is my friend.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 전치사를 앞에 놓는 경우 (격식):

> This is the house **in which** I was born.
> The girl **to whom** I talked is my friend.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **전치사 + that은 불가!** 반드시 which나 whom을 써야 해요.

> ❌ the house **in that** I was born
> ✅ the house **in which** I was born
> ✅ the house **that** I was born **in**

👩‍🏫 선생님: 전치사가 앞에 오면 관계대명사 **생략 불가**!

> ✅ the house I was born in (전치사 뒤 — 생략 가능)
> ❌ the house in I was born (전치사 앞 — 생략 불가)

**Q. 다음 중 문법적으로 올바른 문장을 고르세요.**
1. This is the room in that I sleep.
2. This is the room in which I sleep. ✅
3. This is the room in I sleep.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 아주 좋아요. 관계대명사 that 앞에는 전치사를 쓸 수 없고(1번 오답), 전치사가 관계대명사 앞으로 왔을 때는 생략할 수 없어서(3번 오답) 'in which'가 올바른 형태입니다!

🧑‍🎓 학생: 전치사 + which/whom은 격식! 전치사 + that은 불가! 전치사가 앞에 있으면 관계대명사를 생략할 수 없다는 것도 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 133: 전치사+관계대명사 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
This is the shop (     ) (     ) I bought the bag.
> **정답** at which (in which)

---

**02.** She is the person ? ? I talked.
> **정답** to whom

---

**03.** This is the pen ? ? I write.
> **정답** with which

---

**04.** The house ? ? he lives is big.
> **정답** in which

---

**05.** The man ? ? she works is kind.
> **정답** with whom (for whom)

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
This is the school which I graduated.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → from which

---

**07.** He is the friend who I play with.
(전치사+관계대명사로)
> **정답** He is the friend with whom I play.

---

**08.** The chair which she sat is old.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → on which

---

**09.** She is the girl who I gave the book.
(전치사+관계대명사로)
> **정답** She is the girl to whom I gave the book.

---

**10.** This is the room which we study.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → in which

---

**11.** 두 문장을 전치사+관계대명사를 사용하여 한 문장으로 만드시오.
I have a friend. I play soccer with him.
> **정답** I have a friend with whom I play soccer.

---

**12.** This is the house. She lives in it.
> **정답** This is the house in which she lives.

---

**13.** I found the pen. She writes with it.
> **정답** I found the pen with which she writes.

---

**14.** He is the man. I talked to him yesterday.
> **정답** He is the man to whom I talked yesterday.

---

**15.** This is the school. I graduated from it.
> **정답** This is the school from which I graduated.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
이것은 내가 사는 집이다.
This the is house in which I live
> **정답** This / is / the / house / in / which / I / live

---

**17.** 그녀는 내가 이야기한 사람이다.
She the is person to whom I talked
> **정답** She / is / the / person / to / whom / I / talked

---

**18.** 이것은 내가 쓰는 펜이다.
This the is pen with which I write
> **정답** This / is / the / pen / with / which / I / write

---

**19.** 이것은 내가 졸업한 학교이다.
This the is school from which I graduated
> **정답** This / is / the / school / from / which / I / graduated

---

**20.** 그는 내가 함께 일하는 사람이다.
He the is person with whom I work
> **정답** He / is / the / person / with / whom / I / work
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 133: 전치사+관계대명사 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
I met the girl ______ you're speaking of.
Seoul is the city ______ Tom was born in.
who - in which
that - who
who - which
who - that
> **정답** who - that, who - which

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
This is the house in ______ she was born.
He's the rude boy about ______ I talked.
which - that
which - whom
that - whom
which - who
that - that
> **정답** which - whom

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The bed in ______ I slept last night was very
comfortable.
These are the great inventions for ______ he is well-
known.
that - which
that - that
which - that
which - which
> **정답** which - which

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
He brought some chairs ______ the guests can sit.
The movie ________ we went was interesting.
on which - in which
for which - of which
on which - to which
on which - on which
> **정답** on which - to which

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The man ____________ I work pays me a fair salary.
The picture ___________ Tom is looking at is
beautiful.
in whom - which
for who - at which
for whom - which
at whom - which
> **정답** for whom - which

---

**06.** 어법상 어색한 것을 모두 고르시오.
The girl at who I was looking suddenly
disappeared.
Tom misses the hometown in which he grew
up.
The picture at Amy is looking is beautiful.
The professor to whom I wrote a letter called
me today.
> **정답** The girl at who I was looking suddenly disappeared., The picture at Amy is looking is beautiful.

---

**07.** 어법상 어색한 것을 모두 고르시오.
My grandma used to talk about the city which
she was born.
The person for that Amy was waiting never
came.
We need some more tables at which guests
can sit.
Do you like the music to which I am listening?
> **정답** My grandma used to talk about the city which she was born., The person for that Amy was waiting never came.

---

**08.** 어법상 어색한 것을 모두 고르시오.
Tom is a good friend on whom I can depend.
Is this the key for which you were looking?
The cat in which Tom lives is two years old.
The man with that Amy is talking is my dad.
> **정답** The cat in which Tom lives is two years old., The man with that Amy is talking is my dad.

---

**09.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 올바른 문장을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
Before it is too late, we need to protect the
Earth on which we live.
The man to who I talked was helpful.
Soccer is a sport of that my friends and I are
very fond.
What is the title of the movie about which you
told me yesterday?
> **정답** Before it is too late, we need to protect the Earth on which we live., What is the title of the movie about which you told me yesterday?

---

**10.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 어색한 문장을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
My mom is going to attend the wedding that
her sister was invited to.
Chinese is the second most universal
language for which many people are
interested.
Tom is my special roommate with who I share
my room.
Amy's daughter is a very active girl whom I'm
taking care of.
> **정답** Chinese is the second most universal language for which many people are interested., Tom is my special roommate with who I share my room.

---

**11.** 다음 두 문장을 전치사와 관계대명사를 사용하여 한
문장으로 만드시오.
The market has fresh vegetables. I usually go to it.
The market I usually go has fresh
vegetables.
> **정답** to, which

---

**12.** 다음 두 문장을 전치사와 관계대명사를 사용하여 한
문장으로 만드시오.
I met the girl. You're speaking of her.
I met the girl you're speaking.
> **정답** of, whom

---

**13.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
This is the house which my
grandparents live.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → in which

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Do you know the guy with
who Tom goes jogging every
morning?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** who → whom

---

**15.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
The university to that I want
to go is in Los Angeles.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → which

---

**16.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 가장 적절한 것을
고르시오.
Mr. Brown was the teacher.
I told you about him.
Mr. Brown was the teacher who I told you
about him.
Mr. Brown was the teacher about whom I told
you.
Mr. Brown was the teacher about him I told
you.
Mr. Brown was the teacher about who I told
you.
> **정답** Mr. Brown was the teacher about whom I told you.

---

**17.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 가장 적절한 것을
고르시오.
The man is a candidate.
Many people work for him.
The man is a candidate who many people
work for.
The man is a candidate for him many people
work.
The man is a candidate who many people
work for him.
The man is a candidate for who many people
work.
> **정답** The man is a candidate who many people work for.

---

**18.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 가장 적절한 것을
고르시오.
This is a nice website.
I find good information on it.
This is a nice website which I find good
information.
This is a nice website which I find good
information on it.
This is a nice website that I find good
information on.
This is a nice website on that I find good
information.
> **정답** This is a nice website that I find good information on.

---

**19.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 가장 적절한 것을
고르시오.
This is the camera.
I took the photo with it.
This is the camera which I took the photo with
it.
This is the camera which I took the photo.
This is the camera with that I took the photo.
This is the camera with which I took the
photo.
> **정답** This is the camera with which I took the photo.

---

**20.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 가장 적절한 것을
고르시오.
I enjoyed the music.
We listened to it after dinner.
I enjoyed the music to which we listened after
dinner.
I enjoyed the music to that we listened after
dinner.
I enjoyed the music to which we listened to
after dinner.
I enjoyed the music to whom we listened after
dinner.
> **정답** I enjoyed the music to which we listened after dinner.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 133 전치사+관계대명사중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 두 문장을 관계대명사를 이용하여 한 문장으로
완성하시오.
The woman is my science teacher. You smiled at
her.
→ The woman  (     )   (     )   (     )  at is my
science teacher
→ The woman  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  is
my science teacher.
정답 who (whom, that), you, smiled, at, whom, you,
smiled

---

**02.** 두 문장을 관계대명사를 이용하여 한 문장으로
완성하시오.
Dr. Kennedy is a famous business man. I work for
him.
→ Dr. Kennedy is a famous business man 
  (     )  for.
→ Dr. Kennedy is a famous business man for
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 who (whom, that), I, work, whom, I, work

---

**03.** 두 문장을 관계대명사를 이용하여 한 문장으로
완성하시오.
I cleaned the sofa. My dog sleeps on it everyday.
→ I cleaned the sofa  (     )   (     )  
 on everyday.
→ I cleaned the sofa on  (     )   (     )  
 everyday.
정답 which (that), my, dog, sleeps, which, my, dog, sleeps

---

**04.** 두 문장을 관계대명사를 이용하여 한 문장으로
완성하시오.
We had the meeting. I suggested a good idea
during the meeting.
→ We had the meeting  (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     )  during.
→ We had the meeting during  (     )  
  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 which (that), I, suggested, a, good, idea, which, I,
suggested, a, good, idea

---

**05.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
Did you hear the time of arrival of that the pilot
reminded all passengers?
→ Did you hear the time of arrival
 all passengers?
정답 of which the pilot reminded

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
The art gallery displays a lot of paintings for which
she is interested.
→ The art gallery displays a lot of paintings
.
정답 in which she is interested

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
There's a tree in that you can find eagles.
→ There's a tree
.
정답 in which you can find eagles

---

**08.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (단, 전치사 + 관계대명사를 활용할 것)
Frank가 함께 축구를 하는 사람들은 그의 이웃들이다.
힌트 (     ) play, soccer
The people  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
are his neighbors.
정답 with, whom, Frank, plays, soccer

---

**09.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (단, 전치사 + 관계대명사를 활용할 것)
우리가 보러 갔던 그 영화는 재미있었다.
힌트 (     ) go
The movie  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  was
interesting.
정답 to, which, we, went

---

**10.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (단, 전치사 + 관계대명사를 활용할 것)
나는 Sally가 이야기하고 있는 소년을 알고 있다.
힌트 (     ) be, talk
I know the boy  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 to (with), whom, Sally, is, talking

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 133: 전치사+관계대명사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) I met the boy ______ you're talking about.
This is the city ______ Amy was born in. who - in which that - who who - which who - that
> 정답: who - that, who - which

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
This is the room in ______ she studied.
He's the quiet boy about ______ I spoke.
which - that which - whom that - whom which - who that - that
> 정답: which - whom

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The chair in ______ I sat yesterday was very soft.
These are the wonderful inventions for ______ she is well-known.
that - which that - that which - that which - which
> 정답: which - which

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She brought some plates ______ the guests can eat.
The museum ________ we went was fascinating.
on which - in which for which - of which on which - to which on which - on which
> 정답: on which - to which

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 바르게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The woman ____________ I study pays close attention to detail.
The painting ___________ Tom is looking at is colorful.
in whom - which for who - at which for whom - which at whom - which
> 정답: for whom - which

---

**06.** 어법상 어색한 것을 모두 고르시오.
The boy at who I was staring suddenly waved at me.
Tom misses the town in which he grew up.
The book at Amy is reading is very thick.
The professor to whom I wrote an email replied today.
> 정답: The boy at who I was staring suddenly waved at me., at Amy is looking is beautiful.

---

**07.** 어법상 어색한 것을 모두 고르시오.
My uncle used to talk about the village which he was born.
The student for that Tom was waiting never showed up.
We need some more desks at which students can study.
Do you like the podcast to which I am listening?
> 정답: My uncle used to talk about the village which he

---

**08.** 어법상 어색한 것을 모두 고르시오.
Amy is a good friend on whom I can rely.
Is this the pen for which you were searching?
The house in which Tom lives is three years old.
The girl with that Amy is chatting is my sister.
> 정답: The girl with that Amy is chatting is my sister.

---

**09.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 올바른 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Before it is too late, we need to protect the ocean on which we depend. which we depend.
The boy to who I spoke was kind.
Art is a subject of that my classmates and I are very fond.
What is the name of the book about which you told me yesterday?
> 정답: Before it is too late, we need to protect the ocean on which we depend.

---

**10.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 어색한 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) My dad is going to attend the ceremony that his colleague was invited to.
Korean is the second language for which many people are interested.
Amy is my closest classmate with who I share my lunch.
Tom's son is a very athletic boy whom I'm looking after.
> 정답: Korean is the second language for which many people

---

**11.** 다음 두 문장을 전치사와 관계대명사를 사용하여 한 문장으로 만드시오. The bakery has fresh bread. I usually go to it. The bakery I usually go has fresh bread.
> 정답: to, which

---

**12.** 다음 두 문장을 전치사와 관계대명사를 사용하여 한 문장으로 만드시오. I met the woman. You're talking about her. I met the woman you're talking.
> 정답: about, whom

---

**13.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. This  is  the  school  which  my sister  studies. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: which → in which

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Do  you  know  the  girl  with who  Amy  goes  swimming  every weekend? 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: who → whom

**15.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
The  school  to  that  I  want to  go  is  in  New  York. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> 정답: that → which

**16.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
Ms. Park was the teacher.
I told you about her.
Ms. Park was the teacher who I told you about her.
Ms. Park was the teacher about whom I told you.
Ms. Park was the teacher about her I told you.
Ms. Park was the teacher about who I told you.
> 정답: Ms. Park was the teacher about whom I told you.

---

**17.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
The woman is a leader.
Many people work for her.
The woman is a leader who many people work for.
The woman is a leader for her many people work.
The woman is a leader who many people work for her.
The woman is a leader for who many people work.
> 정답: The woman is a leader who many people work for.

**18.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.

I find helpful tips on it.

This is a useful app that I find helpful tips on.
This is a useful app on that I find helpful tips.

**19.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
This is the brush.
I painted the wall with it.
This is the brush which I painted the wall with it.
This is the brush which I painted the wall.
This is the brush with that I painted the wall.
This is the brush with which I painted the wall.

**20.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때 가장 적절한 것을 고르시오.
I enjoyed the song.
We listened to it during the trip.
I enjoyed the song to which we listened during the trip.
I enjoyed the song to that we listened during the trip.
I enjoyed the song to which we listened to during the trip.
